name: linSetWakeupBehavior
title: linSetWakeupBehavior
description: Defines the behavior after wake-up signal or an internal wake-up.
When LIN hardware is not in sleep mode calling this function will have no effect.

parameters.name: restartScheduler
parameters.description: Determines if index of the slot to be started with after wakeup has to be reset, i.e. it becomes 0. If it’s not reset the next slot before entering sleep mode is used.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.

description: Change wake-up behavior on receiving a sleep mode event
